title: Pork Ssam Italian Wrap
description: A unique fusion of Italian flavors and Korean-style pork ssam. Tender pork, crunchy vegetables, and creamy sauce wrapped in a crispy Italian flatbread.
instructions: Season the pork shoulder with salt, pepper, and Korean chili flakes.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium-high heat.
Sear the pork shoulder until browned on all sides, then transfer to the oven and cook until tender, about 20-25 minutes.
Meanwhile, toast the Italian flatbread slices in the oven for 2-3 minutes, or until crispy.
In a small bowl, mix together ricotta cheese, soy sauce, and minced garlic.
Assemble the wraps by spreading a tablespoon of ricotta mixture on each flatbread slice.
Top with sliced cucumber, grated carrots, chopped green onions, and a few slices of the cooked pork shoulder.
Drizzle with olive oil and serve immediately.
